nodes.name: 三趾鹑科
nodes.summary: 三趾鹑科（Turnicidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联12种鸟类，如Sumba buttonquail、Black-rumped buttonquail、Fynbos buttonquail等12种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 黑腰三趾鹑
nodes.summary: 黑腰三趾鹑（Turnix nanus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Black-rumped buttonquail。

nodes.name: 鸻形目
nodes.summary: 鸻形目（Charadriiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联310种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、短腿鸻、白鞘嘴鸥等310种鸟类。

nodes.name: 三趾鹑属
nodes.summary: 三趾鹑属（Turnix）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联15种鸟类，如Red-backed buttonquail、棕三趾鹑、Spotted buttonquail等15种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Black-rumped buttonquail
nodes.summary: The black-rumped buttonquail (Turnix nanus) is a small species of bird in the buttonquail family. Description This species has a brown back, rufous chest, and pale belly, brown irises and a black rump. As usual for buttonquails but not for most birds, the female is larger and brighter than the male. The birds are shy and difficult to flush. Distribution and habitat The species is found in open grassland through much of Africa outside the forested and more arid regions. It is resident in the central parts of the range but is a migratory breeder further north towards Lake Chad and the Central African Republic. References Madge and McGowan, Pheasants, Partridges and Grouse ISBN 0-7136-3966-0 Sinclair, Ian; Hockey, Phil; Tarboton, Warwick (2002). SASOL Birds of Southern Africa. Struik. ISBN 1-86872-721-1. External links Black-rumped buttonquail - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.

nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
